header.description: Hello! I'm Damián Rodríguez, a Frontend Developer from Buenos Aires, Argentina. Over 2 years of experience building modern digital solutions.

development.description: High-performance digital products built with the best technologies and industry best practices

vanicracia.title: Vanicracia
vanicracia.description: E-commerce focused on astrology, featuring various sections including services, courses, and products. It allows users to explore and purchase items, view their details, and access pre-recorded courses. It also includes a shopping cart with integrated payment systems and a user authentication system that supports login, registration, and password recovery.
vanicracia.technologies: Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind, Zod, React Hook Form, React Toastify, Motion, Redux Toolkit, TanStack Query

alfombrasTauro.title: Alfombras Tauro
alfombrasTauro.description: A website specialized in rugs, offering a wide range of products, accessories, and services. It allows users to explore each category, access their respective items, and view detailed information about each one.
alfombrasTauro.technologies: Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind, Zod, React Hook Form, Motion, TanStack Query

dondeSalgo.title: Dónde Salgo
dondeSalgo.description: Mobile application for Android and iOS, focused on the search for parties and other places around Buenos Aires. It features several sections and an intuitive user flow. In addition, it includes a complete authentication system, an admin panel, among many other features.
dondeSalgo.technologies: React Native, Expo, TypeScript, Zod, React Hook Form, TanStack Query, Redux Toolkit, React Native Reanimated, i18next

spotifyMobile.title: Spotify Mobile
spotifyMobile.description: A clone of the Spotify mobile app. It features a variety of sections and playlists with their respective songs, as well as a functional floating player and its corresponding screen.
spotifyMobile.technologies: React Native, Expo, TypeScript, Redux Toolkit, React Native Reanimated

lopezPropiedades.title: Lopez Propiedades
lopezPropiedades.description: Web application for a real estate agency, focused on managing and displaying properties for sale and rent. It includes property listings and detail pages, institutional sections such as services, about us, and contact with a form. Additionally, it includes a complete admin panel with authentication, a dashboard, and property creation, editing, and listing features for property management.
lopezPropiedades.technologies: Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind, Zod, React Hook Form, Motion, Supabase
